abstractHtml: SUMMARY: A method of assaying the antibiotic cephalosporin C in low concentration in culture fluids by using a strain of Vibrio cholerae is described. The formation of spheroplasts of the test organism in subinhibitory concentrations of the antibiotic and chemically related compounds is discussed.
affiliationsHtml: • Medical Research Council Antibiotics Research Station, 4 Elton Road, Clevedon, Somerset
